rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 17, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT DON FELTON, CULLIGAN WATER SYSTEMS COMPANY SACRAMENTO DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Demurrer is moot as to Culligan Water Systems. Demurrer by Don Felton is improperly brought by a decedent. Arguments brought for the first time in reply without any citation to authority of admissible evidence are not considered. =(501/CFH)
